title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process for Cloud Security
description: A flowchart depicting the cyclical process of Continuous Internal Evaluation for a Cloud Computing & Security module, highlighting the key stages from objective setting to final assessment and feedback.
relationships: Formative Assessments feed into Summative Assessments
All Assessments are Evaluated for Performance
Performance Feedback leads to a Remediation Plan
Remediation Plan loops back to inform Learning Objectives
